title: Actually Pale Pale Oak Leaves
description: This resource pack edits the pale oak leaves texture to be more white instead of the boring and quite dull gray texture from the oringinal game.
body:
This pack changes the color of pale oak leaves to a more "mysterious" silvery white.

I'm also planning to add bushy leaves functionality very soon.
(((The version labeled "Bushy Leaves" makes the leaves bushy for compatibility with other bushy leaves resoure packs. Just make sure to have this one above the other in the list.)))

![The pale garden with paler leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58cc16499a028ccea31dd6452a1ef49d6d5eceaa.jpeg)
